case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ANTONIO PARRA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 70.00 - SERVED AUG-03-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARRA, ANTONIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARRA, ANTONIO $3,107.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,177.00, SFHA ESTABLISHED ITS DEMAND FOR LACK OF PAYMENT FOR SERVICES RENDERED; DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CYNTHIA BAUTISTA--SFHA INTERN. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,107.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT PARRA, ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
